notes: Goal review: no clear aerial/top-down/elevated image showing house and backyard/lot together. Only ground-level exterior/yard/context shots; photo 29 appears elevated scenic/context but not clearly the property.

Goal review: photo 1 is the clearest elevated/aerial-style view showing houses and surrounding lots; likely useful for house-plus-yard context. Photo 8 gives elevated deck/backyard perspective; photo 4 adds yard coverage.
Goal review: no aerial/top-down/elevated view found. Backyard/lot coverage is good at ground level, especially photos 22-27, with photo 27 showing rear house/patio plus yard context.
Goal review: only visible exterior candidate is front/streetside snowy view; no clear aerial, top-down, elevated backyard, or full lot coverage.
Goal review: several ground-level exterior shots show house and snowy yard/setting, but no true aerial/top-down/elevated house-plus-backyard view.

Goal review: photo 2 is the strongest top-down lot/house view; photo 1 provides elevated front/lot context; photo 3 is elevated scenic/context but less useful for backyard/lot.
